sources.claim: code review evaluates design, functionality, complexity, tests, naming, comments, style, documentation, every line, and context
sources.name: Google Engineering Practices - Code Review

sources.claim: secure code requires input validation, output encoding, access control, cryptography, error handling/logging, data/file/memory management, and general coding practices
sources.name: OWASP Secure Coding Practices Checklist

sources.claim: semantic conventions define keys and values describing common operations, including error and exception attributes
sources.name: OpenTelemetry Semantic Conventions

sources.claim: secure development should reduce vulnerabilities, mitigate impact, and address root causes to prevent recurrence
sources.name: NIST SSDF SP 800-218
